title: Colored Enchants
description: A CIT Resewn Resource pack that allows you to color your enchanted gear in many different colors! A Perfect Customization addition to add to your Trimmed and Already Enchanted Gear!
body:
![Colored Enchants Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e025789334a38ada3f8887ad3effb4cb65733e.png)
--

Colored Enchants has a variety of Colored Enchants. The Full chart below showcases all the colors & Basic Names. Colored Enchants allows a variety of "Neighbor Characters". Neighbor Characters are characters that can be directly next to the Color. All Characters are allowed if they aren't directly next to the color.
### **Requirements**
<sub> 
*Optifine Doesn't Support Enchantment Glint*
</sub>

- #### **Must have CIT Resewn** 
- #### **Items Must Already Be Enchanted***
- ##### ***Items That Can't be can just be renamed**
- #### **Items Must be Named A Color to be a Colored Enchantment.**
# Colored Enchants Chart
| **Demo Color**  | **Color** |  | Compatible Weapon/Tools Types | Compatible Armor Types | Compatible Other Types |
| :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| ![Rainbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7360c4a1c2883ac2c59089c29f32869680082f63.png)  | Rainbow |  | Netherite Weapons & Tools |  Netherite Armor | Enchanted Golden Apple | 
| ![Red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8bd65ca20490c4bc85c6cc8b612594e2ac8de7.png) | Red |  | Diamond Weapons & Tools | Diamond Armor | Potions | 
| ![Orange](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209ae5e504c19591eb9362346cfccd1db43908e4.png) | Orange |  | Iron Weapons & Tools | Iron Armor | Enchanted Book | 
| ![Yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed108c4f5e2d64f0a5306e149c20430edf2d379.png) | Yellow |  | Golden Weapons & Tools |  Golden Armor | Compass | 
| ![Lime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78c17e75e4b6cc1ebe99ef640b55d591cc5aad5.png) | Lime |  | Stone Weapons & Tools | Chainmail Armor | Experience Bottle | 
| ![Green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bbf544ecb5588ffa89af308e47d9db25c9807db.png) | Green |  | Wooden Weapons & Tools | Leather Armor | Carved Pumpkin | 
| ![Cyan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ceb0dbc93a1bbd50ee5f3f4d65d4ade5d489a8.png) | Cyan |  | Trident | Turtle Shell |  | 
| ![Blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fff3b395bb75a1e2b6cd5381d71bba2fc3ab8d24.png) | Blue |  | Bow |  |  |
